name: 12M Payday Loans
description_short: 12M Payday Loans offers short-term payday advances up to $5,000 with same-day funding across 11 Ohio locations. Fast cash for urgent expenses with in-store and online application options.
description_long:
12M Payday Loans operates a multi-location payday lending network across Ohio with 11 physical storefronts serving communities including Columbus, Cincinnati, Cleveland, Toledo, Akron, and Dayton. The company positions itself as a solution for consumers facing unexpected financial emergencies who need rapid access to cash. Founded to serve the urgent borrowing needs of Ohioans, the company emphasizes accessibility and speed as core value propositions.

12M Payday Loans offers payday advances up to $5,000 in Columbus (with products including up to $1,500 loans specifically mentioned) that borrowers repay from their next paycheck. Customers can apply online through the website or visit physical locations during business hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-4pm weekends). The application process requires state-issued ID, recent pay stubs or bank statements, and bank account information. The company also provides check cashing services alongside payday loan products.

The company differentiates through multi-location convenience across Ohio's major metropolitan areas, extended weekend hours (open Saturdays and Sundays), and emphasis on privacy protection and fast processing. Their website positions service speed and customer safety as competitive advantages, with branch managers available to discuss loan estimates and fee ranges upfront. The company encourages customers to call ahead to plan visits and clarify required documentation.

12M Payday Loans operates in the payday lending sector, which carries inherent structural concerns: payday loans typically carry very high APRs (often 400%+ annualized), create debt traps through rollover cycles, and are designed for short-term cash needs rather than financial solutions. The website provides no fee disclosure, APR information, or loan terms—critical details absent from their public materials. This is best suited only for consumers with genuine one-time emergencies and confirmed ability to repay within the loan term.
address: 1521 N Cooper St ste 570, Arlington, TX 76011

company_info.headquarters: 1521 N Cooper St ste 570, Arlington, TX 76011

pros: 11 physical Ohio locations provide accessible in-person service across major cities
Extended weekend hours (10am-4pm Saturday-Sunday) for working customers
Same-day loan funding advertised for qualified applicants
Online application option available alongside in-store applications
Branch managers offer upfront loan estimate and fee range discussions
Check cashing services available in addition to payday loans
Emphasis on customer privacy and data protection stated on website
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed anywhere on website—customers must visit in person to learn actual costs
Payday loans inherently carry very high annualized interest rates (typically 400%+) and create debt cycle risks through rollover borrowing
Loan amounts ($1,000-$5,000) and short repayment terms make this a predatory product for financially vulnerable consumers
No alternative products offered; company provides only payday loans and check cashing, not financial solutions
Website lacks required loan terms, conditions, and transparent pricing typically expected in consumer lending
best_for: Consumers with genuine one-time emergencies who can repay the full loan within the term from their next paycheck
Ohio residents without access to bank loans, credit cards, or family/employer advances
Customers who need check cashing services in addition to emergency cash
diagnosis: 12M Payday Loans is best for Ohio residents facing genuine one-time financial emergencies who can repay within weeks from their next paycheck and have exhausted alternative borrowing options. The critical caveat: payday loans are extremely expensive short-term debt (typically 400%+ APR) that frequently trap borrowers in rollover cycles; the company provides no transparent pricing on their website, making it impossible to evaluate true cost before visiting in person.
services: Payday loans up to $5,000 in Columbus (up to $1,500 loans specifically available)
Short-term cash advances repayable from next paycheck
In-store loan applications at 11 Ohio locations
Loan estimate consultations with branch managers
Required document guidance prior to store visit
Multiple location accessibility across Ohio metros (Columbus, Cincinnati, Cleveland, Toledo, Akron, Dayton, Mansfield, Canton, Newark, Lakewood, Oregon)
